summary: Completed frontend testing of Hungarian CRM 'Feldolgozatlan' status default and related features as specified in review request. All 5 required features successfully tested and verified working.

flaky_endpoints.impact: Cannot directly access project workers via API

integration_issues.issue: Session timeouts occur during long test sequences requiring re-authentication

passed_tests: ✅ Bejelentkezés successful with admin@crm.hu / Admin123! - Backend API and frontend both working
✅ Új dolgozó űrlapon 'Feldolgozatlan' alapértelmezett státusz látszik - Status field shows '⚪ Feldolgozatlan' as default
✅ Státusz dropdown tartalmazza a Feldolgozatlan opciót - Verified in form and working properly
✅ Oldalsó menü nem tűnik el dolgozó hozzáadás után - Sidebar remains visible on new worker form page
✅ Tulajdonság hashtagek működnek - Found working hashtag buttons: #Megbízható, #Jó munkaerő, #Rossz minőség, #Rövidtávú munkaerő
✅ Backend API supports Feldolgozatlan status filtering (/api/workers?global_status=Feldolgozatlan)
✅ Property hashtag buttons are clickable and functional in the form
✅ Status field correctly defaults to 'Feldolgozatlan' in WorkerFormPage.js line 32
✅ Dashboard navigation and sidebar functionality working properly
success_percentage: backend: 94.1% (16/17 tests passed), frontend: 100% (all 5 required features verified working)
